title: Fill & Draw Noth Operate As Expected
author: HerbalDratini
body:

- [x] I made sure that there are **no existing issues** - [open](https://github.com/FossifyOrg/Paint/issues) or [closed](https://github.com/FossifyOrg/Paint/issues?q=is%3Aissue+is%3Aclosed) - to which I could contribute my information.

### Affected app version

Beta 1.4.0

### Affected Android/Custom ROM version

Android 16+

### Affected device model

Galaxy

### How did you install the app?

None

### Steps to reproduce the bug

•Choose a prominent color & fill background. If noth, yi'll noth obverve such observations.
•Deslect the fill icon & choose a differ color.
•Draw a shape with multiple lines/strokes; or stroke about the page with multiple lines connecting at least all with one line of same color.
•Select the fill icon & choose a differ color. Zooming in would help with ensuring selecting the right [set of] pixel[s]/square[s].
•If zoomed in & drew a shape, or if multiple lines touch; aft multiple attempts to recolor the shape/lines & keeping the recolor attempt, noth only will observe a larger coloring, like'll observe (aft zooming out) additional lines/shapes unnecessarily drawn/painted [betwixt selecting the undo icon].

### Expected behavior

What beth expected, as depicted in the steps to reproduce & how we understand any paint app to execute?

### Actual behavior

As depicted in the reproduction steps.

### Screenshots/Screen recordings

Noth sure how screenshots would prove reproductions. As many retardings/hinderings of our devices; capacity beth amongst.

### Additional information

Regardless of mandatory selections of radio buttons:
Ensuring noth of existing issues/discussions/FAQs: If existing, likely of (at least encroaching) illegal interactions; God[s] knoweth how long since release if the app.
Taken time to fill in details: Trouble ticket submitted, no?
This trouble ticket only reports a single bug: That'd beth nonsensical; yiz of Unix/Linux communities knoweth system reported bugs dothn't, & extremely rarely, submit a single trouble ticket without multiple issues/bugs. Why would anything else beth differ??

Why doth it matter what brand/model beth used/installed on when, much like other Unix/Linux OSs/environments, it'll affect nigh every brand/model? To identify [at least] publicly the specific model & submodel violates personal OpSec (operation secret/security; multiple versions); otherwise, (rhetorical & facetious) what serveserver brand/model doth yiz use? Notice selecting how installing the software isn't mandatory; for such is of multiple OpSec[s]. Thank yiz in advance. God[s] bless/speed!!🤟

title: Change app picture opening behavior
author: hooddy
body:
### Checklist

- [x] I made sure that there are **no existing issues** - [open](https://github.com/FossifyOrg/Paint/issues) or [closed](https://github.com/FossifyOrg/Paint/issues?q=is%3Aissue+is%3Aclosed) - to which I could contribute my information.
- [x] I made sure that there are **no existing discussions** - [open](https://github.com/orgs/FossifyOrg/discussions?discussions_q=is:open+label:paint) or [closed](https://github.com/orgs/FossifyOrg/discussions?discussions_q=is:closed+label:paint) - to which I could contribute my information.
- [x] I have read the FAQs inside the app (Menu -> About -> FAQs) and my problem isn't listed.
- [x] **I have taken the time to fill in all the required details. I understand that the request will be dismissed otherwise.**
- [x] This issue contains only one feature request.
- [x] I have read and understood the [contribution guidelines](https://github.com/FossifyOrg/Paint/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

### Feature description

I've been meaning to write for a long time, but I couldn't gather my thoughts. The app behaves inconveniently with files. Okay, my phone has a square screen, and I chalked it up to the specifics of that particular phone. But I had to get a second phone - it's quite standard with a rectangular screen - and the same issue happens there too.

How I mostly use your app: I take a screenshot and open it in Paint to either remove a sensitive part or highlight something important. But the app opens the file by cropping the top and bottom parts of the screenshot, and often the edits need to be made precisely on those parts hidden by the app's interface.

You'll object that there's panning and zooming of the canvas with two fingers. Yes, there is. But then empty space gets added to the original image from zooming, and it ends up not much better than having the top and bottom cropped.

How I see the fix:

- When opening a file, it should fit into the available window space, meaning the top and bottom shouldn't overlap the original image. And if someone needs to zoom or pan it - fine, nothing prevents that. 
- Or another option: The file opens without fitting to the available space, but it's positioned starting from below the top interface, with the bottom part extending off-screen. But you can pan the file without adding to its canvas, i.e., without changing its visible size.
- Or a third option: The file opens full-screen, the app interface overlaps it from top and bottom, but becomes transparent, allowing edits to the overlapped image parts. 

Actually, all three options would be appropriate depending on the phone (rectangular or square) and the specific situation.

### Why do you want this feature?

It's inconvenient for me to use the app in its current form. I'm confident these changes would improve the user experience.

### Additional information

That's how I see it. Sorry if I didn't explain it very clearly. My English level leaves much to be desired.

Samsung

Import an image, draw on it and turn the screen of your phone to pass on landscape mode

- [x] **I have taken the time to fill in all the required details. I understand that the request will be dismissed otherwise.**
- [x] This issue contains only one feature request.
- [x] I have read and understood the [contribution guidelines](https://github.com/FossifyOrg/Paint/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

### Feature description

Saving should save the full picture including the parts that are not visible on the screen.
N.B.: It is already the case when saving in the svg format, making this feature less necessary (only necessary when saving in jpg or png formats)

### Why do you want this feature?

Currently only the part visible on the screen is saved. If we do forget to zoom out, the outsides part is lost. And sometimes we simply cannot zoom out, for example when we are using more space than the zoom out allows, or in the landscape mode that allows less space than the normal mode

It would also be very nice if we could also choose the resolution of the saved image in order to not loose the details

### Additional information

_No response_

title: Touch location and pen location different after zooming / screen rotation
author: golemusu
body:
<!-- Failed to upload "fossify-paint-touch-pen-location-bug1-H5-qb3000k.mp4" -->

<!-- Failed to upload "fossify-paint-touch-pen-location-bug1-H5-qb3000k.mp4" -->

### Checklist

- [x] I can reproduce the bug with the latest version given [here](https://github.com/FossifyOrg/Paint/releases/latest).
- [x] I made sure that there are **no existing issues** - [open](https://github.com/FossifyOrg/Paint/issues) or [closed](https://github.com/FossifyOrg/Paint/issues?q=is%3Aissue+is%3Aclosed) - to which I could contribute my information.
- [x] I made sure that there are **no existing discussions** - [open](https://github.com/orgs/FossifyOrg/discussions?discussions_q=is:open+label:paint) or [closed](https://github.com/orgs/FossifyOrg/discussions?discussions_q=is:closed+label:paint) - to which I could contribute my information.
- [x] I have read the FAQs inside the app (Menu -> About -> FAQs) and my problem isn't listed.
- [x] **I have taken the time to fill in all the required details. I understand that the bug report will be dismissed otherwise.**
- [x] This issue contains only one bug.
- [x] I have read and understood the [contribution guidelines](https://github.com/FossifyOrg/Paint/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

### Affected app version

1.2.0

### Affected Android/Custom ROM version

OxygenOS (Android) 14

### Affected device model

Oneplus Pad Go

### How did you install the app?

F-Droid / IzzyOnDroid

### Steps to reproduce the bug

sometimes paint goes to "draw to wrong place" bug mode. This happens typically after first drawing something with pencil and then zooming out with 2 fingers. Also I now noticed that the bug appears sometimes when I turn the device from portrait to landscape or back (auto rotate android UI is enabled).

When bug is present if I touch pixel 300,300 and pull it to pixel 600,600, the actual line on the screen could appear to pixels 600,100 - 900,400.

The length of error vector varies, sometimes it could be 25% of the length of display and sometimes only 2-5%

Getting rid of the bug I have to go to settings - apps - Fossify Paint - force stop.

Device is Oneplus Pad Go (Mediatek G99 soc, 8GB RAM, 2480 x 1720 resolution (1.4 aspect ratio), 11 inch screen).

I did just 5min test with my phone (galaxy S21fe, 2300ish x 1080 res) and in that time I was unable to reproduce it.

Worth noting is that this tablet has unusual aspect ratio and resolution for androids (typical android tablets are 1.6 aspect ratio and phones are over 2). Nevertheless IMO this is best aspect ratio and e.g. iPad aspect ratios are at same ballpark (1.33 - 1.5).

With tablet it is much more common to rotate the device than with phones (IMO) so program should take this into account.

The bug does not appear every time, I am not sure what factors cause it. But if you take a tablet, start drawing, doing lot of 2 finger pinch zooms in and out and drawing in different zooming factors, sometimes panning (moving 2 fingers to any directions), and then rotating the device so that auto-rotate happens you have high change of running into this bug.

I suspect that the bug is on the algorithm which translates touch coordinate to drawn pixel coordinate.

### Expected behavior

pen location remains in touch location

### Actual behavior

pen location is different than touch location

<!-- Failed to upload "fossify-paint-touch-pen-location-bug1-H5-qb3000k.mp4" -->

### Screenshots/Screen recordings

Here is link to screen recording of the bug (skip to 00:28 if you want to see it directly). I tried to attach it but was unable to do it so below is a nextcloud to the recording (h265)

[https://nx76363.your-storageshare.de/s/AY8GA5gkaXkqzc4](https://nx76363.your-storageshare.de/s/AY8GA5gkaXkqzc4)

### Additional information

.

### Feature description

I suggest adding alternative layouts, and most importantly tablet layout.

settings - "use tablet layout" would be simple implementation

I am using paint now on android tablet in landscape. All tools (except brush size) are too far in upper left corner.
For left hander like me it is even a bit more annoying to access them.

In tablet layout I'd move all tools to one line on top where save and trash icons are now.
Best arrangement would be to have tools most frequently accessed in the middle of the line and less accessed ones closer to edges

### Why do you want this feature?

.

### Additional information

_No response_

### Feature description

I suggest adding a setting "use confirmation dialogue for delete". When this setting is enabled pressing the trash can icon would bring "do you want to delete this?, yes / no" dialogue. Ideally as close to the icon as possible so that you don't have to move finger far away.

I am asking because I accidentally deleted a pic which I made for 15mins or so.

### Why do you want this feature?

.

_No response_

title: cache the current session
author: poyribn
body:
### Checklist

- [x] I made sure that there are **no existing issues** - [open](https://github.com/FossifyOrg/Paint/issues) or [closed](https://github.com/FossifyOrg/Paint/issues?q=is%3Aissue+is%3Aclosed) - to which I could contribute my information.
- [x] I made sure that there are **no existing discussions** - [open](https://github.com/orgs/FossifyOrg/discussions?discussions_q=is:open+label:paint) or [closed](https://github.com/orgs/FossifyOrg/discussions?discussions_q=is:closed+label:paint) - to which I could contribute my information.
- [x] I have read the FAQs inside the app (Menu -> About -> FAQs) and my problem isn't listed.
- [x] **I have taken the time to fill in all the required details. I understand that the request will be dismissed otherwise.**
- [x] This issue contains only one feature request.
- [x] I have read and understood the [contribution guidelines](https://github.com/FossifyOrg/Paint/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

### Feature description

Fossify Paint should save a full snapshot of the current session into its cache, so that the drawing doesn't disappear when i use other apps and later re‑open Paint from the recent apps list.

### Why do you want this feature?

Without this feature, the drawing disappears when Android clears working memeory for the 1 or 2 most recently used apps.
With this feature, Paint can restore the session because a backup is stored outside RAM.

### Additional information

_No response_

title: Option request: Disable one-finger gestures, keep two-finger gestures enabled.
author: ei14
body:
### Checklist

- [x] I made sure that there are **no existing issues** - [open](https://github.com/FossifyOrg/Paint/issues) or [closed](https://github.com/FossifyOrg/Paint/issues?q=is%3Aissue+is%3Aclosed) - to which I could contribute my information.
- [x] I made sure that there are **no existing discussions** - [open](https://github.com/orgs/FossifyOrg/discussions?discussions_q=is:open+label:paint) or [closed](https://github.com/orgs/FossifyOrg/discussions?discussions_q=is:closed+label:paint) - to which I could contribute my information.
- [x] I have read the FAQs inside the app (Menu -> About -> FAQs) and my problem isn't listed.
- [x] **I have taken the time to fill in all the required details. I understand that the request will be dismissed otherwise.**
- [x] This issue contains only one feature request.
- [x] I have read and understood the [contribution guidelines](https://github.com/FossifyOrg/Paint/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

### Feature description

Currently the user can enable/disable movement gestures. I'd like an extra level of granularity: Disable gestures like double tap to zoom, while keeping gestures like two finger zoom enabled.

### Why do you want this feature?

When painting, one often strikes the canvas multiple times in rapid succession. With gestures enabled, this frequently causes unintended zooming in and out. The only way to prevent this is to completely disable gestures. But gestures like two-finger zoom / move are very useful, and they wouldn't cause the same issue if enabled.

### Additional information

_No response_

It should ask or open the default. 
Not like it is now that it seems to open "files" - the Google app that comes preinstalled.

### Why do you want this feature?

For not being reinstalling that app when we disable it. 
Like when opening url links from apps . Some apps code it to open in chrome, so if we hae disabled chrome it reinstall it.
-thats other good practice in link handling for all apps(open in default browser,not in chrome.

title: Pin colors in the settings
author: GameOverFlowChart
body:
### Checklist

- [x] I made sure that there are **no existing issues** - [open](https://github.com/FossifyOrg/Paint/issues) or [closed](https://github.com/FossifyOrg/Paint/issues?q=is%3Aissue+is%3Aclosed) - to which I could contribute my information.
- [x] I made sure that there are **no existing discussions** - [open](https://github.com/FossifyOrg/Paint/discussions) or [closed](https://github.com/FossifyOrg/Paint/discussions?discussions_q=is%3Aclosed) - to which I could contribute my information.
- [x] I have read the FAQs inside the app (Menu -> About -> FAQs) and my problem isn't listed.
- [x] **I have taken the time to fill in all the required details. I understand that the request will be dismissed otherwise.**
- [x] This issue contains only one feature request.
- [x] I have read and understood the [contribution guidelines](https://github.com/FossifyOrg/Paint/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

### Feature description

I want a new option in the settings which let's me select and pin the starting palettes (with color code at least, or the full color picker which we already have in the app). Restarting the app should use the pinned colors instead of the last used colors. A hybrid approach would be the best, right now there are 5 colors in the app so if one would pin x colors, 5-x of the last used colors could be saved where as the x number of pinned colors always stay the same. 

### Why do you want this feature?

There are some colors I use every time. And sometimes I need some other colors. Whenever I use the other ones, some of the ones I always use get dropped to make room the the new one time only used colors. So I have to use the color codes to set to the old colors back.

### Additional information

_No response_
